AHMED KHALIL
HSE Manager
Dubai, UAE
+971 50 123 4567
ahmed.khalil@email.com

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced HSE Manager with 10+ years in construction and oil & gas sectors. Expert in ISO 14001, ISO 45001, NEBOSH certification. Led safety programs across UAE and GCC reducing incident rates by 40%.

WORK EXPERIENCE

Senior HSE Manager | Gulf Construction LLC | Dubai, UAE | 2018 – Present
• Implemented ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 management systems across 12 project sites
• Conducted risk assessments and incident investigations for high-rise construction
• Trained 200+ workers on safety protocols and emergency response
• Reduced LTIFR by 45% through proactive safety culture programs
• Managed compliance with UAE Labour Law and ADNOC safety standards

HSE Officer | Petro Emirates | Abu Dhabi, UAE | 2013 – 2018
• Supported QHSE audits and regulatory compliance inspections
• Developed safety documentation and SOPs for offshore operations
• Coordinated with civil defence and environmental agencies

EDUCATION
BSc Environmental Science | UAE University | 2012

CERTIFICATIONS
• NEBOSH International General Certificate
• IOSH Managing Safely
• ISO 14001 Lead Auditor
• ISO 45001 Lead Auditor
• First Aid & CPR Certified

SKILLS
HSE Management, Risk Assessment, Incident Investigation, Compliance Auditing, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, Safety Training, Emergency Response Planning, Environmental Management, Sustainability Reporting

LANGUAGES
Arabic (Native), English (Fluent)
